name_en: DI0R❣️Oblique Backpack 'Big D Blue Canvas Large'
name_cn:
DI0R❣️Oblique Backpack 'Big D Blue Canvas Large'
A DI0R Oblique backpack that can be a couple's item. Featuring a vintage print on canvas with a small metal logo, it is soft and cute. The canvas material is very lightweight, has a large capacity, and is small in weight with great style ~
The iconic oblique vintage print pattern has been integrated into everyone's fashionable attitude ~ Carrying vintage items makes you feel like you're at Paris Fashion Week everywhere. Recommended🖤 for a couple's look
Large: 30×42×15CM
Small: 23.5×11×32CM
#088 510
